Notice Of Motion Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents Or For In Camera Review And Documents Requested At Deposition Of Greyhounds Pmk Re Hr Employment Records Declaration Of Michael Padway In Support Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And To Continued Deposition Of Stephen Garback And Proposed Order
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Plaintiff Jordan Smith's Motion To Compel Production Of Unredacted Documents Or For In Camera Review And Documents Requested At Deposition Of Greyhounds Pmk Re Hr Employment Records Declaration Of Michael Padway In Support Of Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And To Continued Deposition Of Stephen Garback.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed motion is GRANTED. Defendant Greyhound Lines Inc. ("GLI") shall (a) provide to Plaintiff's counsel (i) an unredacted copy of the reports attached as Exhibit 2 to the Padway Declaration dated March 13, 2018 and (ii) documents responsive to Plaintiff's Request for Production No. 21, by not later than the close of business on April 17, 2018; and (b) produce its driver for further deposition at a mutually agreeable time by not later than April 20, 2018. The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and submit the proposed order to Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/HEK)
